'''Sassich''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. She was a [[Police officer/Legends|member]] of [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]], and became its director at the age of forty, a great achievement. However, it came due to a huge commitment to her work that resulted in a mid-life crisis that included her divorcing her husband, getting personal training lessons from twins half her age, and buying a [[Color/Legends|red]] [[ZRX-29 airspeeder]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
